title: Picasso Migration Manifest
description: State of the autonomous migration queue. The orchestrator reads this to find the next component, respect dependency order, and not duplicate work. v3 — May 2026 re-audit; targets @base-ui/react v1.4.1 + Tailwind 4.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema (relative or absolute) for editor tooling.

version.description: Semver of the manifest format. Bump on breaking schema changes.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the manifest was last regenerated from scratch.

components.description: Map of component ID -> ComponentEntry. ID is the canonical key the orchestrator uses (e.g. "Note", "query-builder/AutoComplete").

tier.description: Migration complexity tier. 0=light (@mui/base→@base-ui/react package swap), 1=cleanup-only (peer-dep + type-only fixes), 2=heavy (MUI v4+JSS rewrite), 3=heavy composite, 4=sibling package, 5=provider runtime canary.

package.description: Repo-relative path to the package directory (e.g. "packages/base/Note").

status.description: queued = ready to claim; in_progress = orchestrator owns it; done = merged; needs_human = orchestrator escalated; blocked = waiting on a dependency.

depends_on.description: Component IDs that must reach status=done before this can be picked. Sourced from migration plan §3.7.

target_path.description: @base-ui/react import path the migrated component targets (e.g. "@base-ui/react/tooltip"). Use "none" for components that stay custom (Backdrop, Badge, Container, FileInput, Grid, Notification, Page; all already-clean Tier 1). Use "decision-pending" for components awaiting a Step 8 architectural decision (Popper). Use " + " to join multi-target paths (e.g. "@base-ui/react/menu + @base-ui/react/popover").

worktree.description: Repo-relative path to the active worktree (e.g. "migration-runs/2026-05-04/Note/worktree"). Cleared after merge.

iterations.description: Number of agent attempts on this component. Hard cap defaults to 3; see references/escalation.md.

merged_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the PR merged. Drives downstream depends_on satisfaction.

notes.description: Free-form annotation visible to the orchestrator and human reviewers (e.g. "PF-1992 sandbox canary").

escalation_reason.description: Set when status=needs_human; concise reason the orchestrator gave up.
